title: Clean out production sheds
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean out production sheds demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean shed

pcs.text: Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work to be undertaken and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the shed and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the shed and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the potential environmental and biosecurity impacts of cleaning the shed and seek advice from supervisor for managing these impacts.

pcs.text: Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the shed and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the shed and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Raise, dismantle or remove equipment from the shed and clean according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cover or seal electrical switchboards and other equipment to prevent entry of water according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for cleaning operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to clean shed

elements.title: Clean shed and surrounds

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of litter and manure according to workplace environmental practices and supervisor instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove dust and cobwebs from all surfaces.

pcs.text: Service filters and flush drinker lines and tanks

pcs.text: Empty and clean silos where appropriate

pcs.text: Prepare and use cleaning agents according to safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use cleaning agents according to safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use cleaning agents according to safe working practices.

pcs.text: Air shed prior to re-entry of staff and re-installation of equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Air shed prior to re-entry of staff and re-installation of equipment.

pcs.text: Handle and use chemical agents safely according to workplace health and safety practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and use chemical agents safely according to workplace health and safety practices.

pcs.text: Dry clean electrical equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dry clean electrical equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dry clean electrical equipment.

pcs.text: Check run-off from cleaning activity complies with workplace environmental and biosecurity practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check run-off from cleaning activity complies with workplace environmental and biosecurity practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check run-off from cleaning activity complies with workplace environmental and biosecurity practices.

pcs.text: Clean production sheds and surrounds using appropriate cleaning and hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean production sheds and surrounds using appropriate cleaning and hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean production sheds and surrounds using appropriate cleaning and hygiene procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete cleaning records and documentation.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes and faults, wear or damage of machinery or equipment to supervisor
